name: openhost
description: Your home server. Reachable. Nothing else in between. Resolve oh://<pubkey>/ URLs over end-to-end encrypted WebRTC.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'
